_note: Canonical NON-SECRET tenant identity for the CADETS (cawgcadets.org) Apps Script project (scriptId 15LW...). Recovered from the pre-clobber cadet config.gs. Enter these as TENANT_* Script Properties on the cadets project — do NOT put them in config.gs (a push overwrites it).
_behavioral_note: The cadet tenant's BEHAVIORAL differences (MEMBER_TYPES.ACTIVE=CADET only, CADET_LITE=true, ACCESS/PUBLIC auto-create off, distribution lists = all-hands + cadets + parents, no .seniors or command-staff lists) are now driven by TENANT_PROFILE=cadets (see the seniors/cadets profiles in src/config.gs, incl. SQUADRON_DISTRIBUTION_TOGGLES). Setting TENANT_PROFILE alone gives correct cadet behavior; no config.gs edits needed.
_xt_note: Cross-tenant contacts (src/cross-tenant-contacts) publishes the SENIOR roster into this tenant's GAL — mirror image of the seniors project. XT_PEER_DOMAIN below is the only non-secret cross-tenant value; the peer read-only service-account creds (XT_PEER_SA_EMAIL/SUBJECT via setupCrossTenantConfig(), XT_PEER_SA_KEY by hand) are set on the project, NOT stored here.
_command_domain_note: Unit command staff (commanders, personnel officers, deputy commanders) are SENIOR members and hold no cawgcadets.org account, so notifications/RecoveryEmailNotify.gs must address them on the senior domain. Required on this tenant; blank would derive first.last@cawgcadets.org and mail nobody.
_personal_address_note: TENANT_DIRECTOR_RECRUITING_EMAIL is an individual role-holder's mailbox, so it is deliberately BLANK here rather than version-controlled — set it directly in Script Properties on the project. Blank fields are skipped by setupTenantConfig(), so re-running this never clears an existing value.
